hero.name: Coherence-Network
hero.welcome_md: Third and current iteration. Next.js 15 + FastAPI + Neo4j + Postgres on Hostinger behind Traefik and Cloudflare. The page you are reading is rendered by it. The full realization of the [2000 thesis](/people/backtracking-model-languages) ' conviction — *one self-describing system that lives, breathes, and attributes —* carried through [Living-Resonance-Codex](/people/living-resonance-codex) and [Living-Codex-CSharp](/people/living-codex-csharp), and now circulating as the network you are inside.
hero.overlay_class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-background via-background/85 to-background/30

facts.label: Graph
facts.value_md: Neo4j (Cypher) · Postgres for relational state · auto-attune resonance scoring

facts.label: Infrastructure
facts.value_md: Hostinger VPS · Docker Compose · Traefik · Cloudflare

facts.label: Lineage back
facts.value_md: Carries the U-CORE Node primitive from [CSharp](/people/living-codex-csharp); the visionary frame from [the Codex](/people/living-resonance-codex); and the unwinding-without-sediment posture from [the 2000 thesis](/people/backtracking-model-languages).

articles.body_md: Five tiers, each thin and each substitutable, with Coherence-Network's distinctive layer being the *graph + auto-attune* at the heart:
articles.heading: Architecture

articles.body_md: Every relationship in the graph belongs to one of seven canonical edge-type families. Each family has its own hue calibrated for both light and dark themes — visiting any page, the colors of the lines tell you what kind of relationship you're looking at without reading any words: The substrate's geometric grammar — visible in the sets a DJ reads as `(8, …)` regenerative-octad cycles, in the relationships rendered as spectrum-colored edges, in the resonance-walks the API performs to find conceptually-near material — is the live descendant of the 2000 thesis's choose/Cut/MultiMatch primitives. The grammar grew. The conviction held.
articles.heading: Seven edge-type families

articles.body_md:
A spark arrives. It enters the graph as an *idea* node with auto-derived edges to vision concepts whose language overlaps. The community refines it; specs crystallize; tasks emerge; agents (Claude, Codex, Cursor, humans) co-weave the implementation across worktrees; commits ship through CI to production. The network measures coherence — how much the realization stays true to the original spark — and attributes contribution proportionally back to every cell that touched the arc.

The 2000 thesis encoded backtracking as the architecture of execution. The 2026 network encodes coherence as the architecture of attribution. Same posture: the system *knows* what holds.
articles.eyebrow: What the network does for the visitor
articles.heading: Idea → spec → ship → coherence-weighted attribution

articles.body_md:
The network describes itself at two levels.

**At the data level.** Every entity is a Node (the U-CORE primitive from [CSharp](/people/living-codex-csharp) ). The schema describing what a Node looks like is itself a Node. The interaction-log of changes is a stream of Nodes. There is no off-graph state. The system can ask itself any question about its own structure with the same queries it answers about anything else.

**At the surface level.** Every presence page (this one included) renders the live influence-web from the graph alongside its hand-curated content. Refinements to the data layer take effect immediately; refinements to the curated layer ship through code review. Both surfaces stay in lock-step because both read from the same source.

The two-level self-description is the same shape [BML](/people/bml-language) 's grammar achieved in 2000 (the parser parses its own grammar) raised one level higher: the entire operational system now parses its own state.
articles.heading: Self-describing, twice over

articles.body_md:
The repo's commit verbs encode the unwinding-without-sediment posture from the 2000 thesis as a living practice. Every commit is one of:

- `tend:` — actively circulating what's alive
- `attune:` — realigning the body's sense of itself
- `compost:` — releasing what no longer circulates
- `release:` — letting go of once-loved forms with care

Same shape as `DO` / `UNDO` in BMCPU, different substrate. The instruction had two semantics because the architecture chose symmetry; the commit has a posture because the practice chose presence.
articles.heading: Tend, attune, compost, release

metadata.title: Coherence-Network — current iteration
metadata.description: Third and current iteration of the post-thesis arc. Next.js 15 + FastAPI + Neo4j + Postgres on Hostinger behind Traefik and Cloudflare. The full realization: living relational graph, edge-typed spectrum coloring, presence pages, contribution attribution, and federated coherence-scored payout from idea to ship.

en.footer_md: Repository: [github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network) · Live: [coherencycoin.com](https://coherencycoin.com) · [api.coherencycoin.com](https://api.coherencycoin.com) · Pulse: [pulse.coherencycoin.com](https://pulse.coherencycoin.com). The current breath of a 26-year-old conviction. The lineage backward goes to [CSharp (2024)](/people/living-codex-csharp), [Codex (2023)](/people/living-resonance-codex), and [the 2000 thesis](/people/backtracking-model-languages).

note_from_body.body_md: This page about Coherence-Network is rendered *by* Coherence-Network. Hand-built JSX content (this body's intentional curation) is composed with the live influence web (the system's own self-perception of its relationships) on the same surface. The system describes itself the way [BML](/people/bml-language) 's grammar described itself in 2000 — twenty-six years apart, same conviction.
